criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No topic-specific weight is stated in the available source documents (call_entry.procedure is empty in the slice). Call-specific excellence signals: proposals must demonstrate advanced approaches to AI agent planning, reasoning, memory management, and multi-agent coordination; robustness and reliability of autonomous behaviour are explicitly named outcome dimensions. KPI and benchmarking requirements are mandatory per scope text.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. Weight not stated in topic source documents. Standard Horizon Europe scoring scale (0-5 per criterion) and equal-weight treatment of the three criteria assumed per General Annexes. Call-specific priority notes derived from confirmed scope text and expected outcomes.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No topic-specific weight stated in source documents. Call-specific impact signals: contribution to the Apply AI Strategy is an explicit mandate; portfolio coverage procedure awards grants to at least one project per sector (healthcare, advanced manufacturing, in-vehicle autonomous driving), indicating evaluators will weight sector-specific real-world impact; deployment pathways via EDIHs and AI Factories linkage are mandated scope elements that evaluators will assess; cohesion activities with ADRA and GenAI4EU Hub are mandatory and signal broader ecosystem impact expectations.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA criterion. Weight not stated in source documents. Priority notes on sector coverage and Apply AI Strategy contribution are Confirmed from the curated call extract (procedure_exceptions and apply_ai_strategy_contribution fields). The weighting mechanism for portfolio coverage (awarding at least one project per sector) is a procedural priority instrument distinct from criterion-level weights.

criteria.criterion_id: Quality and Efficiency of the Implementation
criteria.criterion_name: Quality and Efficiency of the Implementation
criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No topic-specific weight stated in source documents. Call-specific implementation quality signals: mandatory allocation of tasks for ADRA cohesion activities and GenAI4EU Hub collaboration; mandatory linkage to AI Factories and Data Labs; mandatory KPI, benchmarking, and progress monitoring mechanisms; expectation to build on prior funded actions and establish synergies with other initiatives.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA criterion. Weight not stated in source documents. Implementation priorities incorporated in priority_notes are all Confirmed from the scope text of the slice and mandatory_cohesion_activities field of the curated extract. The criterion label matches the standard Horizon Europe General Annex formulation for RIA evaluation forms.
